title: Consciousness Truth Stack
summary: Consciousness studies subjective experience, awareness, selfhood, and the relationship between brain activity and lived experience.
starterPack: Start with Anil Seth, Chalmers, and Dehaene.
Use Nature Neuroscience and Science for the research layer.
Read around the hard problem before picking a theory.

tiers.title: First Principles
tiers.description: Core claims that frame the field.

items.name: Consciousness is subjective experience
items.description: It is the fact that experience is happening at all.

items.name: Brains and bodies matter
items.description: Awareness is tied to neural and physiological processes.

items.name: The hard problem remains open
items.description: We do not yet know why experience exists.

items.name: Anil Seth
items.description: Leading public voice on consciousness research.

items.name: David Chalmers
items.description: Hard problem and philosophy of mind.

items.name: Stanislas Dehaene
items.description: Global Workspace Theory and cognitive neuroscience.

tiers.title: Practitioners
tiers.description: The working roles around consciousness research.

items.name: Clinical neuropsychologists
items.description: Work with consciousness-linked disorders and assessment.

items.description: Interdisciplinary study of mind and brain.
